name: Beef Stroganoff II
recipeInstructions:
1. Freeze the beef slightly; remove from freezer and slice diagonally into thin slices.
2. Melt butter in a large pot or pan over medium-high heat.
3. Add beef and cook until browned. Drain any excess liquid.
4. Add onions and cook for 5-10 minutes.
5. Add garlic and mushrooms, cooking for an additional 3-4 minutes.
6. Stir in tomato sauce, tomato paste, brown sugar, cider vinegar, water, paprika, Worcestershire sauce, mustard, salt, and pepper. Cook for 30-45 minutes until the sauce has thickened.
7. In a large pot, bring water to a boil and add noodles. Cook according to package directions.
8. Drain the cooked noodles.
9. Stir sour cream into the meat mixture and cook for a couple of minutes until thickened.
10. Add the cooked noodles and combine thoroughly.
11. Serve.
